name: Easy Homemade Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together sweetened condensed milk and chocolate syrup.
2. Fold in whipped cream until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into an aluminum foil-lined 9x5-inch loaf pan.
4. Cover tightly with plastic wrap or foil.
5. Freeze for at least 6 hours, or until firm.
6. Scoop ice cream from the pan or remove it and peel off the foil to slice.
7. Return leftovers to the freezer.
Variations:
- Coconut Almond: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 2 tbsp water, 2 egg yolks, and 4 tsp vanilla extract. Fold in whipped cream with 1/2 cup toasted coconut flakes and 1/2 cup toasted almonds.
- Coffee: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 1 tbsp instant coffee dissolved in 2 tbsp water, 2 beaten egg yolks, and 4 tsp vanilla extract. Fold in whipped cream.
- French Vanilla: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 2 tbsp water, 2 beaten egg yolks, and 4 tsp vanilla extract. Fold in whipped cream.
- Lemon: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 2 tbsp REALEMON (R) reconstituted lemon juice, 1 tbsp grated lemon rind, and a few drops of yellow food coloring. Fold in whipping cream.
- Mint Chocolate Chip: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 2 tsp peppermint extract, 3-4 drops green food coloring, and 2 tbsp water. Fold in whipped cream and 1/2 cup small dark chocolate-flavored baking chips.
- Mocha: Dissolve 1 tbsp instant coffee in 1 tsp hot water; combine with sweetened condensed milk and chocolate syrup. Fold in whipped cream.
- Raspberry: Omit chocolate syrup. Add a (10-ounce) package of frozen raspberry purée in syrup to a blender; blend until smooth. In a large bowl, combine the mixture with sweetened condensed milk and whipped cream.
- Strawberry: Omit chocolate syrup. Thaw a (10-ounce) package of frozen strawberry purée in syrup. Blend until smooth. In a large bowl, combine strawberries, sweetened condensed milk, and whipped cream.
- Peanut Butter: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 2 tbsp water, 2 beaten egg yolks, and 1/2 cup peanut butter. Fold in whipped cream.
- Peppermint Candy: Omit chocolate syrup. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, 4 tsp vanilla extract, and whipped cream. Add crushed hard peppermint candy.
- Peach: Omit chocolate syrup. Drain the liquid from a (16-ounce) can of peaches. Blend until smooth. In a large bowl, combine peaches, sweetened condensed milk, 3 beaten egg yolks, and 1/2 tsp almond extract. Fold in whipped cream.
